channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Explosion, fire at Erbil high-rise amid Iranian attacks
item.description: Video shows a large explosion and fire at a high-rise building in Erbil reportedly near the US Consulate.

item.title: Arms manufacturer thrives amid US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: Elbit Systems has seen rapid growth as wars intensify across Iran, Palestine, and Lebanon.

item.title: Building collapses after Iranian missile strike on Israel
item.description: A building has collapsed in Bnei Brak, near Tel Aviv, after Israeli authorities said it was hit by an Iranian missile.

item.title: Trump claims US has achieved ‘regime change’, ‘received present’ from Iran
item.description: US President Donald Trump has told reporters in the Oval Office that the US has achieved regime change in Iran.

item.title: Iraq to summon US, Iran envoys over deadly attacks: PM’s office
item.description: Iraqi government says it plans to deliver 'formal notes of protest' amid recent strikes tied to US-Israeli war on Iran.

item.title: NASA to spend $20bn on moon base, nuclear-powered Mars spacecraft
item.description: The agency will increase robotic missions to the Moon and launch a nuclear spacecraft called Space Reactor 1 Freedom.

item.title: Iranian missiles cause injuries and major damage across Israel
item.description: Iran released a video showing the launch of missiles as a new wave targeted areas across Israel.

item.title: Has Iran brought down an ‘unkillable’ US F-35 jet?
item.description: Iran says it struck a US F-35 and released footage of the incident.

item.title: Russia hits Ukraine with rare daytime barrage as new offensive begins
item.description: Ukraine's President Zelenskyy warns that Kyiv faces a deficit of missiles as Washington is focused on its war on Iran.

item.title: US says they’re talking, Iran says they’re not. Who’s telling the truth?
item.description: Critics say Trump's claim of negotiations is a tactic to calm the market, but could the Iranians be ready to talk?
